NEUVILLETTE_CHARACTER_NEUVILLETTE.title: Neuvillette
NEUVILLETTE_CHARACTER_NEUVILLETTE.descri:
The solitary judge of Fontaine.
Harness the tides of judgment.
NEUVILLETTE_CHARACTER_NEUVILLETTE.cardsM: Neuvillette cards can now appear in rewards and shops.
NEUVILLETTE_CHARACTER_NEUVILLETTE.unlock: Win a run as [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
NEUVILLETTE_CHARACTER_NEUVILLETTE.goldMo: I must admit that, under certain human laws, this is more efficient than due process.
NEUVILLETTE_CHARACTER_NEUVILLETTE.eventD: When the tide rises again, I shall return...
